myapp_onboarding.description: 6-screen onboarding. Tap "Continue" (bottom-center) to advance on screens 1–5. Last screen has "Terms of Service" and "Privacy Policy" links.

steps.label: AI agents notifications intro
steps.review: Clean onboarding layout, but the pagination dots (6 total) are small and low-contrast against the light background, which may be hard to see for users with visual impairments.

steps.label: Install Mac app prompt
steps.review: Screen is Mac-specific but shown on Android; consider platform-aware content to avoid confusing mobile users.

steps.label: free trial offer screen
steps.review: The screen has excessive empty space between the body text and the pagination dots, making the layout feel unbalanced; content could be vertically centered for better visual hierarchy.

steps.label: End-to-end encryption feature
steps.review: Clean and minimal layout with strong visual hierarchy; the monospaced font for the heading creates slight stylistic inconsistency with the body text.

steps.label: Step-by-step guide tutorial
steps.review: Clean layout with clear CTA, but the link "agentsatwork.app/tutorial" could be styled more distinctly to signal it's tappable.

steps.label: QR code link mobile screen
steps.review: This is the final onboarding screen; the primary CTA is "Scan QR Code" rather than "Continue," which breaks the pattern established in screens 1–5 and may confuse users expecting a consistent button label.
